title: 2025-07-22 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 3.42
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-07-22: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 3.42/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-07-22, the score printed 3.42/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
